title: jasminum pauciflorum
intro: Jasminum pauciflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the few-flowered jasmine. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum pauciflorum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and protecting against age-related diseases due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
